name: Code Review
description: Structured code review with builder, reviewer, and red team.

phases.name: Submit
phases.prompt: Present the code or feature you want reviewed. Explain what changed and why.

phases.name: Review
phases.prompt: Review the submission. Identify issues, suggest improvements. Be specific and evidence-based.

phases.name: Respond
phases.prompt: Address the feedback. What will you change? What do you disagree with and why?

phases.name: Summary
phases.prompt: Summarise: what was agreed, what changes are needed, what remains unresolved.
